subcodes.first_line: The musk of inner meanings hath been diffused, yet none shall find it save those who have clung to the truth, turning away from all that is vain and remote. By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاح مسک المعانی و لم یجده الا من تمسک بالحق معرضا عن کل باطل بعید تالله قد
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God
